examples.text: Yet the cost of reducing carbon dioxide emissions, for the United States alone, will be higher than the cost of solving the world's single, most pressing health problem: providing universal access to clean drinking water and sanitation.
examples.explanation: 然而仅在美国，减少二氧化碳排放的成本将高于解决全球最紧迫健康问题（普及清洁饮用水和卫生设施）的成本。

relations.reason: 两者都属于公共卫生与废弃物处理场景：dispose of 指“处理/清除废弃物”，sanitation 指“卫生设施”，在环境卫生、城市基础设施等语境中常需要互相跳转理解。
